subcodes.title: Words to Louis Gregory, spoken on 1911-04-10
subcodes.first_line: The best thing for it is to accept these teachings. In this way they will gain the confidence of the whites and differences will fade. The Bahá'í teachings reveal the means of both material and spiritual progress.
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
